variant: Non-ALCTV track lighting kit for TR-33, TR-35, TR-50, TR-75 four-post lifts

specifications.purpose: Under-vehicle lighting for four-post lift runways

features: Non-ALCTV version for standard (non-certified) lift installations
Compatible with TR-33, TR-35, TR-50, and TR-75 models
Mounts along lift runways for complete undercarriage visibility

parts_list.description: Non-ALCTV track lighting kit for TR-series four-post lifts

safety_features: Electrical components rated for lift environment
Wiring routed to avoid interference with lift operation
notes: Non-ALCTV version for lifts not requiring ANSI/ALI ALCTV certification
Different from ALCTV light kit - see separate manual for certified version
